Third-Party Notices — LAST KERNEL
==================================

This project incorporates third-party software and assets listed below.
Each is used under its respective license. The full text of applicable
licenses is included where required.

================================================================================
CODE LIBRARIES & PLUGINS
================================================================================

1. DOTween
   Vendor:  Demigiant (Daniele Giardini)
   Version: 1.2.765
   URL:     https://dotween.demigiant.com/
   License: MIT License

   Copyright (c) 2014-2018 Daniele Giardini

   Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining
   a copy of this software and associated documentation files (the
   "Software"), to deal in the Software without restriction, including
   without limitation the rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish,
   distribute, sublicense, and/or sell copies of the Software, and to
   permit persons to whom the Software is furnished to do so, subject to
   the following conditions:

   The above copyright notice and this permission notice shall be included
   in all copies or substantial portions of the Software.

   THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS
   OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO THE WARRANTIES OF
   MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE AND NONINFRINGEMENT.
   IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHORS OR COPYRIGHT HOLDERS BE LIABLE FOR ANY
   CLAIM, DAMAGES OR OTHER LIABILITY, WHETHER IN AN ACTION OF CONTRACT,
   TORT OR OTHERWISE, ARISING FROM, OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE
   SOFTWARE OR THE USE OR OTHER DEALINGS IN THE SOFTWARE.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

2. DOTween Pro
   Vendor:  Demigiant (Daniele Giardini)
   URL:     https://dotween.demigiant.com/pro.php
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

3. Feel / MMFeedbacks
   Vendor:  More Mountains
   URL:     https://feel.moremountains.com/
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
   Note:    The names MMFeedbacks, Feel are © More Mountains.
            Source code may be used freely in shipping games.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

4. Nice Vibrations
   Vendor:  Lofelt GmbH / More Mountains
   URL:     https://github.com/Lofelt/NiceVibrations
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
   Note:    Haptic playback library for mobile. Included as part of Feel.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

5. Text Animator for Unity
   Vendor:  Febucci
   Version: 3.11.1
   URL:     https://www.febucci.com/text-animator-unity/
   License: Commercial EULA
             https://www.textanimatorforgames.com/legal/eula

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

6. Hot Reload for Unity
   Vendor:  Singularity Group
   URL:     https://hotreload.net/
   License: Commercial EULA (development tool only, not distributed in builds)
   Note:    Editor-only development tool. Not included in shipping builds.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

7. Loading Screen Studio
   Vendor:  Michsky
   Version: 2.0.8
   URL:     https://docs.michsky.com/docs/lss/
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

8. Pixel UI
   Vendor:  See original Asset Store package
   URL:     Unity Asset Store
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

9. Kamgam UIToolkit Suite
   Vendor:  Kamgam
   URL:     https://kamgam.com/
   License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
   Includes:
     - UIToolkit Blurred Background
     - UIToolkit Custom Shader Image URP
     - UIToolkit Glow
     - UIToolkit Particles
     - UIToolkit Scroll View Pro
     - UIToolkit Sound Effects
     - UIToolkit Text Animation
     - UIToolkit Text Auto Size
     - UIToolkit World Image
     - UIToolkit Script Components

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

10. PlayMaker
    Vendor:  Hutong Games LLC
    URL:     https://hutonggames.com/
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
              https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
    Note:    Visual scripting tool. Editor-only flows.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

11. PlayMode Save
    Vendor:  PluginMaster
    URL:     Unity Asset Store
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
              https://unity.com/legal/as-terms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

12. Modular 3D Text / Layouts
    Vendor:  Tiny Giant Studio
    URL:     Unity Asset Store
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial)
              https://unity.com/legal/as-terms

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

13. vFolders
    Vendor:  See Asset Store listing
    URL:     Unity Asset Store
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA
              https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
    Note:    Editor-only organisational tool.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

14. Unity MCP (MCPForUnity)
    Vendor:  CoplayDev
    URL:     https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
    License: See repository (check for MIT or Apache 2.0)
    Note:    Development tool only. Not included in shipping builds.

FONTS
================================================================================

15. MiSans
    Vendor:  Xiaomi Inc.
    URL:     https://hyperos.mi.com/font/
    License: MiSans Font License (free for commercial use with attribution)
             https://hyperos.mi.com/font/
    Note:    Used as the primary CJK sans-serif typeface.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

16. Sarasa Gothic (更纱黑体)
    Vendor:  Belleve Invis
    URL:     https://github.com/be5invis/Sarasa-Gothic
    License: SIL Open Font License 1.1
             https://scripts.sil.org/OFL
    Note:    Used as CJK fallback typeface.

    Copyright 2018–2024 The Sarasa Gothic Project Authors

    This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License,
    Version 1.1. This license is available with a FAQ at:
    https://scripts.sil.org/OFL

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

17. Oxanium
    Vendor:  Severin Meyer
    URL:     https://github.com/sevmeyer/oxanium
    License: SIL Open Font License 1.1
             https://scripts.sil.org/OFL

    Copyright 2019 The Oxanium Project Authors

    This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License,
    Version 1.1.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

18. SAIBA-45
    Vendor:  Iconian Fonts (Dan Zadorozny)
    URL:     https://www.iconian.com/
    License: Free for personal use; commercial license required for commercial
             distribution. See https://www.iconian.com/commercial.html
    Note:    Used for display/title text only.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

19. Smiley Sans (得意黑)
    Vendor:  atelierAnchor
    URL:     https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans
    License: SIL Open Font License 1.1
             https://scripts.sil.org/OFL

    Copyright 2022 atelierAnchor

    This Font Software is licensed under the SIL Open Font License,
    Version 1.1.

20. SVG Repo Icons

    License: Creative Commons Zero (CC0) Public Domain
             https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
    Note:    Some card artwork uses icons sourced from SVG Repo.
             Icons have been modified, recoloured, and composited.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

21. Pixeltiers Cyberpunk RPG Icon Pack
    Vendor:  Pixeltiers
    URL:     See original package listing
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA (commercial) or itch.io license
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
    Note:    Icon sprites used for card art and UI elements.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

22. Dragon Crashers Sample Textures
    Vendor:  Unity Technologies

             dragon-crashers-urp-2d-sample-project-190721
    License: Unity Asset Store EULA
             https://unity.com/legal/as-terms
    Note:    Background tile texture used in UIToolkit Custom Shader examples.

UNITY TECHNOLOGIES
================================================================================

24. Unity Engine & Built-in Packages
    Vendor:  Unity Technologies
    URL:     https://unity.com/
    License: Unity Software License Agreement (USLA)
             https://unity.com/legal/licenses/unity-software-license-agreement
    Includes (via Package Manager):
      - Universal Render Pipeline (URP) 17.4.0
      - Input System 1.19.0
      - Localization 1.5.11
      - TextMeshPro (bundled)
      - 2D packages (Sprite, SpriteShape, Tilemap, etc.)
      - Visual Effect Graph 17.4.0
      - Test Framework 1.6.0
      - Newtonsoft.Json 3.2.2
